title: sugkomizo #4792
definition:
1) to carry or bring together, to collect
    1a) to house crops, gather into granaries
 2) to carry with others, help in carrying out, the dead to be buried
    or burned
    2a) to bury
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to carry or bring together, to collect

 2) to carry with others, help in carrying out, the dead to be buried

    NASB:  to bring together, spec. to take up (a body for burial):
